title: matisia alata subsp. corrugata
intro: Matisia alata subsp. corrugata is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae and is native to Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Matisia alata subsp. corrugata include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
